index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>SVG gradient</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="./style.css">
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="https://codetap.org/assets/img/favicon.png">
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="https://codetap.org/assets/img/favicon.png">
</head>

<body>
  <script type="module">
    import { svg } from 'https://esm.sh/css-doodle/generator'

    document.body.appendChild(svg.element(`
    svg {
      viewBox: -5 -5 10 10;
      ellipse*100 {
        fill: none;
        rx, ry: 4 @nN(ease-out, *4);
        transform: rotate(-@nN(ease-out, *240));
        stroke: @linearGradient(
          #fff, #f9a828, #07617d, #2e383f
        );
      }
    }
  `));
  </script>

</body>

</html>
